structured_payload_candidate.parameter_name: Sensible to total heat ratio range
structured_payload_candidate.title: Coil Sensible Heat Ratio Range
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Typical range of sensible to total heat ratio for dehumidifying coils in practice.

structured_payload_candidate.parameter_name: Airflow resistance reduction for dry coil
structured_payload_candidate.title: Coil Airflow Resistance Comparison
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Comparison of airflow resistance between a dry sensible cooling coil and a wet dehumidifying coil.
